text: However, key risks warrant caution. Despite reporting a record Q4 quarter on February 25, 2026, NVDA stock fell approximately 5.5-5.6% in the session following the earnings release [de81755d-f657-4d81-ac51-0e4d3302477e, 09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c]. The broader market impact was significant, with the NVDA-led slump dampening AI market sentiment and causing the S&P 500 and Nasdaq to retreat [7061f02f-e7fd-42b7-a96f-79963f629ca5, dd4ebc75-b8c2-4b83-a876-1d98563bddd1]. This suggests investor concerns about growth sustainability at current valuation levels.
